## Phase Checklist

- [ ] **Design** — relevant ADRs accepted, design brief updated if scope changes
- [ ] **Specification** — `docs/spec/` document written and accepted; interface/contract and requirements defined
- [ ] **Tests** — tests written from spec requirements; all `MUST` requirements have coverage
- [ ] **Implementation** — code written; all requirement-derived tests pass
- [ ] **Issue closed** — PR merged, phase label updated to `phase: implementation`

<!-- Anything else relevant — open questions, dependencies on other issues, constraints. -->
